title: Administrative and Operations Assistant
description:
At Junior Seekers, we’re more than just a student care centre — we’re a community that nurtures young minds through care, structure, and meaningful engagement. We’re on the lookout for an enthusiastic and well-organised individual to support our team in delivering quality programmes and ensuring smooth daily operations.

If you’re passionate about working with children and have a flair for organisation, we’d love to hear from you. Come be part of the Junior Seekers journey!

Key Responsibilities:

1. Administrative Support

- Oversee daily administrative tasks, including data entry, document preparation, filing, and inventory tracking
- Manage communication with parents via phone, email, and written notices
- Assist with programme coordination, scheduling, and logistical support


2. HR Support

- Support recruitment processes: scheduling interviews, assisting with onboarding, and maintaining HR documentation
- Manage staff records, track leave and timesheets, and support training coordination
- Assist in organising internal staff briefings and team communications

3. Operational Support & Relief Duties

- Provide classroom support during staff absences or busy periods
- Assist educators in managing routines and ensuring student safety
- Help coordinate logistics for events, liaise with vendors, and carry out general operational tasks

Requirements:

- GCE ‘O’ Level or equivalent; a relevant diploma is an advantage
- Experience in administrative roles or the early childhood/education sector is preferred
- Strong communication and interpersonal skills
- Proficient in Microsoft Office (Word, Excel, Outlook)
- Self-motivated, dependable, and able to multitask in a fast-paced environment
- Comfortable interacting with children, parents, and external stakeholders
- Candidates with relevant experience are preferred.

Working Hours: 8:30 AM – 5:30 PM Office
Salary Range: $2.6K - $2.8K
Job Type: Full-time

postedCompany.description:
Kowabunga! is the leading Capacity Developer,
Empowering Organisations’ Impact in Sustainability.

We aim to serve as the catalyst and capability builder for the sustainability 

ecosystem, enhancing enterprises' triple bottom line impact - People, Planet and Performance.

At Kowabunga!, our journey has evolved, but our commitment to making a positive impact remains steadfast. We’ve always believed in the power of education to shape responsible and environmentally conscious citizens. Over the years, we’ve had the privilege of inspiring children and youth to become the change-makers our world needs.


Join us on this journey, and let’s work together to create a more sustainable and resilient future for all. Through collaboration, innovation, and a shared commitment to sustainability, we believe we can make a world of difference, one company at a time. Feel free to be as crafty and imaginative as possible when applying as we encourage creativity (even in our application process).
postedCompany.name: KOWABUNGA! GLOBAL PTE. LTD.
